meta.title: Irwin Stelzer on Current Economics in Europe
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of Economic Policy Studies Irwin Stelzer discusses the current economic situation in Europe and German Chancellor Merkel's decision to consider bailing out other countries from their economic situations.
